name: Silicone and Wood Ball Rattle Baby Toy - Cloud Island™
description:
Spark curiosity and creativity in your little one with this Ball Rattle Baby Toy from Cloud Island™. Made from silicone, this rattle toy is free from BPA, PVC and phthalate for your baby's safety. This rattle toy features a wooden block with loops at the center and a wired design in a wavy pattern for imaginative play. Suitable for newborns and up, this rattle toy offers endless joy and fun.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
